# ANALYSIS: J-Anchor-Stage1-Backtest

**Filed:** 2026-05-22
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** stage1_verification
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We need to verify that the current engine (baseline) does not suppress any of the three winner J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) and that it avoids or reduces losses on the four loser J days (5/05, 5/06, 5/07 x2). This Stage-1 backtest will establish the baseline edge_capture for OP-16 anchors.

## Mechanism

Run the existing engine (as defined in heartbeat.md and filters.py) on the 5-minute SPY data for each of the seven J anchor days, recording the engine's P&L per day. Compare to the source-of-truth P&L values to compute edge_capture.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** The engine uses qty=28 as per OP-20 disclosure 1 (requires $25K+ account; $1K paper ~= 14% headline). This analysis assumes the engine's qty logic is unchanged.
2. **Sample bias:** Sample size = 7 days (the J anchor days). Selection method = immutable source-of-truth days per OP-16. Overfit risk: low because days are fixed, but we are only measuring baseline; no parameter tuning.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (this is Stage-1 in-sample on the anchor days themselves; OOS would be other days).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (we have not validated that the engine's simulated fills match real OPRA fills on these days).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day could be a loser day where engine takes a large loss; max drawdown scenario if engine takes multiple loser-day losses; blow-up scenario if engine incorrectly takes all loser days and misses winners.
6. **Concentration:** If the engine's P&L is heavily concentrated on these 7 days, we will disclose after measurement.

## Pre-merge gate

<what tests need to pass: gym validators, walk-forward, real-fills>
- Stage-1 backtest must pass gym validators (67/67) on the full dataset to ensure no regression.
- Real-fills check on top 3 J days (must be within ±20%).
- Out-of-sample walk-forward on non-J days to ensure no overfit.

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- No data yet; analysis is placeholder until backtest run.

This analysis does not conflict with any existing candidate; it is a prerequisite for evaluating any candidate's effect on J anchors.
